_comment: Android test app — ProjectConfig template demonstrating Phase E's runtime tier detection. activeTier="auto" tells GameRunner::runAndroid to call AndroidTierDetect::detectAndroidTier() and substitute the result before constructing EngineDesc. The same substitution fires when activeTier is empty (so the current android_test build, which doesn't pass a configPath to runAndroid, still gets auto-detection — see engine/platform/android/AndroidApp.cpp).
_loading_note: TODO: ProjectConfig::loadFromFile uses raw fopen(); on Android it cannot read APK assets. To make this file load on-device, wire runAndroid(app, configPath) to read via AndroidFileSystem (engine/platform/android/AndroidFileSystem.h) and call loadFromString instead. Until then, this file is a template for game devs to copy into their own runAndroid(configPath)-aware setup, and it's loaded as expected on desktop/iOS.
name: Sama Android Test
